questions.question: The Alapana in Carnatic music is equivalent to which part in Hindustani music?

Match the following List-I (World Events) with List-II (Outcomes) and choose your answer from the code given below. World Events (List -I) Outcome (List-II)1. United Nations Conference on the Human Environment, 1972 i) Millennium Development Goals (MDG)2. Brundtland Report, 1987 ii) Adoption of Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs)3. UN Millennium Summit, 2000 iii) Environmental Movement4. UN Summit, 2015 iv) The word ‘Sustainable Development’ was introduced
The Five Ps of Sustainable Development are:
What should be done in order to minimise waste production?
Which international agreement aims to limit global temperature rise below 2°C?
Which measure has been made mandatory for brick kilns in India to reduce emissions, as per the 2024 government report on pollution control?
questions.option_1: Use of electrostatic filters in stacks
questions.option_2: Conversion to solar thermal drying systems

questions.question: Which of the following Acts in India specifically deals with controlling air pollution?
questions.option_1: Air (Prevention and Control of Pollution) Act, 1984
questions.option_2: Air (Prevention and Control of Pollution) Act, 1981
questions.option_3: Air (Prevention and Control of Pollution) Act, 1988
questions.option_4: Air (Prevention and Control of Pollution) Act, 1990

questions.question: Which of the following is an advantage of paper cups over plastic cups?
Which of the following is an effect of non-biodegradable substances in water bodies?
questions.option_1: Clogs drains and harms aquatic life

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT a feature of the Comprehensive Environmental Pollution Index?
questions.option_2: All the polluting sources identified in the area shall be notified and brought into the public domain.
questions.option_3: It shall be an early warning tool.
questions.option_4: It can applied to locations other than industrial clusters.

questions.option_4: Bridging evidence to policy for healthcare
